summary: Start role-first Researcher routing guide update

details.tier_reason: Multiple operational guide documents will be updated; no runtime product code changes.
details.target_decision: Search, research, latest/current external facts, official docs verification, and model availability questions must be routed through the Researcher procedure. In-session execution may satisfy Researcher routing only when the Researcher instruction, sources, confidence, and Research Summary are produced.

next_action: Patch Analyst and Researcher guides, then validate headers and encoding.

summary: Documented mandatory role-first Researcher routing for search and research requests

details.decision: Search, research, latest/current external facts, official docs verification, and model availability questions must be routed through the Researcher procedure. In-session execution counts only when Researcher instruction, sources, confidence, Research Summary, and execution mode are recorded. External CLI fallback remains conditional, not universal.
details.post_merge_cleanup_plan: After main merge and origin push, delete local task/TASK-20260427-089 and confirm remaining local branch list.

next_action: Commit task branch, merge to main, push origin/main, delete local task branch, and report final branch list.
